landing.ctaSectionDesc: One bad repair or dealer deal can cost thousands. A few minutes with Asaad can save you real money.

upsell.aiFirst: AI first — human when it matters
upsell.quoteTitle: Want Asaad to review this personally?
upsell.quoteDesc: You've got the AI summary. A real expert review catches what AI misses — negotiation tips, shop-specific red flags, and your next move.
upsell.chatDesc: Mini Asaad handles basics. Real Asaad handles high-stakes decisions, dealer negotiations, and complex repairs.
upsell.highRiskTitle: This looks high-risk — talk to Asaad now
upsell.highRiskDesc: Safety, overcharging, or pressure tactics detected. Don't decide alone.

library.title: Knowledge Library
library.subtitle: Short, honest guides to protect your wallet.

scam1.title: The 'Free Inspection' Trap
scam1.summary: Shops offer free inspections, then find $800 in 'urgent' repairs. Here's how to spot it.

scam2.title: Fake OEM Parts
scam2.summary: You're charged for original parts but get cheap aftermarket. Ask to see the packaging.

scam3.title: The Brake Fluid Scam
scam3.summary: Brake fluid flushes are pushed every visit. Most cars need it every 3–5 years, not every oil change.

myth1.title: You Must Change Oil Every 3,000 Miles
myth1.summary: Modern cars often go 5,000–10,000 miles. Check your owner's manual, not the sticker.

myth2.title: Premium Gas Is Always Better
myth2.summary: Unless your car requires it, premium gas won't help. Save your money.

myth3.title: Warm Up Your Car Before Driving
myth3.summary: Modern engines don't need long warm-ups. 30 seconds is enough in cold weather.

dealer1.title: The Payment Pack
dealer1.summary: Dealers focus on monthly payment to hide the total price. Always negotiate the out-the-door price.

dealer2.title: Add-Ons in the Finance Office
dealer2.summary: GAP insurance, paint protection, extended warranties — most are overpriced. Research before you buy.

dealer3.title: Trade-In Lowball
dealer3.summary: Get your trade-in value from CarMax or online tools before stepping on the lot.

payments.title: AI Free. Asaad When It Counts.
payments.subtitle: Start with free AI tools. Upgrade to real Asaad for high-stakes decisions.
payments.upsellHeadline: AI handles the basics — Asaad handles what matters

payments.humanAddOnsDesc: Already have the AI summary? Add a real expert review when you need it.
